corpus.title: Report: Atlas Manufacturing Quarterly Update
corpus.snippet: Atlas Manufacturing reported quarterly results in line with analyst expectations...
corpus.content: Atlas Manufacturing reported quarterly results in line with analyst expectations. Revenue of $57M was up 2.4% year-over-year. CEO remarked conditions remain favourable heading into the next quarter.

corpus.title: News: Lakeview City — Accurate Report
corpus.snippet: Lakeview City reduced property tax rates by 0.8% for the 2024 fiscal year, the first reduction in se...
corpus.content:
Breaking: Lakeview City makes a significant move amid changes in the municipal sector

Lakeview City reduced property tax rates by 0.8% for the 2024 fiscal year, the first reduction in seven years. According to sources familiar with the matter, the decision follows months of internal deliberation. Industry analysts noted the move signals a broader shift in municipal strategy. A spokesperson for Lakeview City declined to comment beyond the official statement.

corpus.title: Lakeview City Council — Tax Rate Ordinance 2023-41
corpus.snippet: Lakeview City reduced property tax rates by 0.8% for the 2024 fiscal year, the first reduction in seven years....
corpus.content:
LAKEVIEW CITY — PROPERTY TAX RATE ORDINANCE 2023-41
Adopted: December 5, 2023 | Effective: January 1, 2024

The City Council hereby sets the FY2024 general property tax levy rate at 6.92 mills per $1,000 assessed value, representing a reduction of 0.8% from the prior year rate of 6.975 mills.

This is the first reduction in the municipal tax rate since FY2017. The reduction reflects a $2.1M surplus carried forward from FY2023.
Adopted unanimously (8-0).
